      "description": "As a product team, I want each task to store a status so that task progress persists for every task.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task schema stores a status field with allowed values pending, in progress, and done",
        "Existing tasks default to pending after migration or backfill",

      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Allow task status updates",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change a task status so that I can keep work progress current.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task status update action accepts pending, in progress, and done values",
        "Changing status saves the new value for the selected task",
        "Invalid status values are rejected",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"

      "notes": ""

      "title": "Show task status badges on task cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want each task card to display its current status so that I can scan progress quickly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards show a visible badge for pending, in progress, and done statuses",

  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add workspace membership role and invitation support",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want membership records to support invitations and editable roles so that admin actions use consistent domain rules.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace membership domain supports viewer, editor, and admin roles",
        "Pending invitations store invitee email and workspace context",

      "title": "Invite workspace members by email",

      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings page accepts an email address and target role for a new invitation",
        "Submitting an invitation creates a pending invitation for the selected workspace",
        "Invitation action records an audit entry for the invite event",

      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings page lets admins switch member roles between viewer, editor, and admin",
